_note: Update this file daily during the tournament. lastUpdated uses ISO 8601.

seattleAlert.message: Lumen Field renovations on schedule. Fan zone locations to be confirmed by June 1.

seattle.message: Lumen Field renovations on schedule. Fan zone locations to be confirmed by June 1.

atlanta.message: MARTA confirms extended rail hours for all Mercedes-Benz Stadium match days. Fan Festival at Centennial Olympic Park opens June 13.
atlanta.source: MARTA / Atlanta World Cup Host Committee

vancouver.message: US visitors: bring a passport — Vancouver is a border crossing. SkyTrain running extended service on BC Place match days.
vancouver.source: Vancouver FIFA World Cup 2026 Host Committee

losangeles.message: Metro K Line extension to Hollywood Park confirmed for all SoFi Stadium match days. Expect heavy I-405/I-105 congestion — transit strongly recommended.
losangeles.source: LA Metro / Los Angeles World Cup Host Committee

seattle.note: Group stage still has availability. Knockout inventory is limited — check back weekly as matches approach.

kansascity.note: Group stage available across most tiers. Arrowhead knockout matches filling earlier than expected.

miami.note: Most listings above face value. Prices likely soften closer to match day — monitor but don't chase yet.

newyork.note: Final and late-round fixtures showing strong demand. If you're planning a July trip, act now before the bracket sets.

philly.note: Limited inventory across all five group stage matches. Round of 16 window worth monitoring weekly as the bracket sets.

atlanta.note: Group stage still near face value outside the two Spain fixtures. Semifinal demand will only climb — secure early if you're targeting July 19.

vancouver.note: Best value in the tournament — CAD pricing and face-value availability on most group matches. France vs Norway is the exception: act now or miss it.

losangeles.note: USA's opener vs Paraguay is already at premium pricing. Other SoFi group matches still near face value — wait on the opener, move on the rest.
